title: Romantic White Crumble Cake
description: A moist and crumbly cake perfect for a romantic evening, topped with a citrusy white glaze.
instructions: Grease a 20cm (8 inch) round cake tin.
Mix the flour, sugar, and softened butter in a large bowl until just combined.
Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract, if using.
Pour the mixture into the prepared cake tin.
Make the crumb topping by mixing the crumble mixture in a small bowl.
Top the cake with the crumb topping.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Allow the cake to cool in the tin for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
Drizzle with romantic citrus glaze while still warm.
